description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with a cache of node_modules/. Define a deploy stage containing a pages job that runs only on the master and pages branches. In the pages job execute the following script steps in order: mkdir -p public, npm ci, sed -i 's#/dist/#/rpn3d/dist/#' src/App.vue, npm run build, cp -r dist public, sed 's#/dist#/rpn3d/dist#' index.html >public/index.html, and cp public/index.html public/404.html. Publish the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Ensure the job also caches node_modules/.
